narrative:
Precinct Bethel South East (precinct in Miami County) has 998 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.5 percentage points.
